name: MemberProviderTreatmentRelationship
title: Member-Provider Treatment Relationship Group
description: A Group resource representing the treatment relationship between a specific member/patient and one or more healthcare providers. The Payer is the managing organization. The member is identified through a characteristic containing the Patient ID. The group members are the providers that have an active or confirmed treatment relationship with the member.
copyright: Used by permission of HL7 International, all rights reserved Creative Commons License

element.short: Unique identifier for the treatment relationship group
element.definition: Business identifier assigned by the payer to uniquely identify this treatment relationship group
Indicates whether this treatment relationship group is active and current
Fixed to 'device' to represent a collection of providers with treatment relationships

element.short: This is an actual collection of providers
element.definition: Indicates this is an actual group of providers, not a virtual group
Classification for this treatment relationship group

element.short: Number of providers in the group
element.definition: The count of providers in this treatment relationship group

element.short: The Payer managing this treatment relationship
element.definition: Reference to the Payer organization that is managing and maintaining this treatment relationship group
Characteristics of the group, including the member (patient) identifier
Fixed code to identify the member characteristic that contains the Patient ID
Reference to the Patient resource for the member

element.short: This is an include, not an exclude
element.definition: The member is included, not excluded

element.short: Period during which this group is valid
element.definition: Start date when the group was created/established; optionally includes an end date

element.short: Providers with treatment relationship to the member
element.definition: List of providers (Practitioners or PractitionerRoles) that have a treatment relationship with the member
Reference to a healthcare provider (Practitioner or PractitionerRole) with treatment relationship
Additional details about the specific treatment relationship

element.short: Whether the treatment relationship is currently active
element.definition: Set to false/not present if the treatment relationship is active; set to true if inactive
